issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal and target_allocations methods causing logic blocks to be incorrectly structured.
No explicit handling of position state persistence beyond instance attributes, which may not persist across calls as expected.
Signal logic uses RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD which is acceptable, but indentation errors prevent correct execution of the intended logic.
Adapter import and usage of 'fetch_prices' with 'Close' column is correct.
Signal and allocation logic follows spec intent to buy low price asset and sell high price asset based on spread thresholds.
